title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.47 — PLATE POLISH ROUND 1 (user on v0.4.46: doubled SUMMING AMP title + 'I prefer the font you chose in the mockup — what is it?'). ANSWER: the mockups fell back to Blender's default text font (Bfont), a DEJAVU SANS derivative — the plugin fonts hadn't been wired into the scene yet when the comps rendered. FIXES: (1) doubled title — the v0.4.46 titleLabel.setVisible(!kPlates) ran BEFORE addAndMakeVisible re-showed it; now hidden after. (2) DejaVu Sans + Bold embedded (Bitstream Vera license file included, Resources/Fonts/DejaVu-LICENSE.txt) as EF::silk/silkBold — ALL lens text (ParamSlider tile labels+values, drawC1SelectorText selector tiles, SummingAmpPanel IronTile) switched from JetBrains Mono to EF::silk to match the renders; instrumentation numerics (meters, readouts) stay mono. (3) Plates rebaked with DejaVu silkscreen (F_TITLE=DejaVuSans-Bold, F_MONO=DejaVuSans in the scene) so baked titles/brand and live lens text share one family. VERIFY: no doubled titles anywhere; tile text reads like the mockups; both themes still swap clean. OPEN: further plate polish per Steve's eyes; LIMITER rename.
